data.title: Wagner Reese Files Civil Suit Following 12-Count Conviction in Assault of Non-Verbal Child on Jennings County School Bus
data.description: In Carmel, Indiana, on April 14, 2026, lawyers Laura Swafford and Stephen Wagner from Wagner Reese, LLP are providing legal representation for a family dealing with the case of their 7-year-old non-verbal special needs child. The child was subjected to multiple incidents of sexual assault in March and April of 2025 by an older student while in transit.

data.title: Starco Brands Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, Starco Brands, Inc. (OTCQB: STCB) disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluded on December 31, 2025. Chairman & CEO, Ross Sklar, emphasized that 2025 showcased positive outcomes including margin growth, portfolio distribution alignment, and expansion through innovation. Sklar noted the company's commitment to optimizing the portfolio, cutting costs, enhancing profitability, and introducing innovative products, all of which were successfully achieved during the period.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to Research-Driven Pagaya Motor Asset Trust 2026-2 and Research-Driven Pagaya Motor Trust 2026-2
data.description: New York-based credit rating agency, KBRA, has provided preliminary ratings for 15 classes of notes issued by Research-Driven Pagaya Motor Asset Trust 2026-2 and Research-Driven Pagaya Motor Trust 2026-2, known collectively as RPM 2026-2. The auto loan ABS transaction includes initial credit enhancement levels ranging from 96.72% for the Class A-1 notes to 3.20% for the Class E-2 notes. This credit enhancement consists of overcollateralization (O/C) and subordination of junior note classes, except for the Class E-2 notes.

data.title: VIP access price for Trump meme coin gala down 90% from last event, offering a more affordable option.
data.description: Individuals interested in receiving VIP treatment at the upcoming Trump meme coin event will find the cost significantly reduced compared to previous occasions. This change in pricing aims to make the VIP experience more accessible.

data.title: ImageTrend's 2026 EMS Insights Report Reveals How Prehospital Care Is Evolving Nationwide
data.description: A recent press release stated that ImageTrend, based in Eagan, Minnesota, revealed the launch of the 2026 EMS Insights Report. This report delves into a comprehensive analysis of national EMS data over multiple years, showcasing the evolving landscape of prehospital care throughout the United States. The report covers EMS activations from 2023 onwards, emphasizing significant trends and shifts in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Dream Industrial Real Estate Investment Trust Announces Offering of C$200 Million Senior Unsecured Debentures, Series H
data.description: Dream Industrial REIT revealed the pricing of a private placement of senior unsecured debentures called Series H Debentures. This offering includes C$200 million in aggregate principal amount of 4.150% Senior Unsecured Debentures, Series H, maturing on April 22, 2031. To support this initiative, the Trust engaged in forward cross-currency interest rate swap agreements.

data.title: Old Glory Bank Home Loans Surge 350% in March, Defying Nationwide Market Declines
data.description: In Elmore City, Oklahoma, Old Glory Bank revealed a significant spike in home loan closings for March, boasting a remarkable 350% increase compared to February. This surge is particularly noteworthy as the overall mortgage market in the country has experienced a decrease in lending activity. Despite challenges such as higher mortgage rates and economic instability leading to a downturn in volume for many lenders, OGB stands out by maintaining an upward trajectory. This success can be attributed to the institution's emphasis on personalized service, commitment to privacy in lending practices, and unwavering dedication to American values.

data.title: Oil prices fall, stocks rise as US-Iran trade proposals for Iran to halt nuclear activity, investors hopeful for peace.
data.description: Investors were optimistic as they observed a potential route to peace, as the United States and Iran discussed proposals for Iran to halt its nuclear activities.

data.title: Paxos Labs secures $12M for Amplify suite, targeting yield, lending, issuance tools for platforms with digital assets.
data.description: Blockchain Capital has invested in the Amplify suite, which strives to empower platforms to produce yield and provide lending services using digital assets held by customers.

data.title: Peraton Appoints Justin R. Ciaccio as President of National Aerospace Solutions Sector
data.description: In Reston, Va., Peraton, a prominent mission capability integrator and technology firm for crucial U.S. government programs, has named Justin R. Ciaccio as President of the National Aerospace Solutions (NAS) sector. Ciaccio will oversee the Federal Aviation Administration's Brand New Air Traffic Control Systems program (BNATCS). Ciaccio's leadership is seen as vital for this role, given his extensive experience in navigating challenging projects.

data.title: Americans' views of China have grown somewhat more positive in recent years
data.description: In April 14, 2026, a recent survey by the Pew Research Center revealed that for over ten years, the majority of Americans held unfavorable opinions towards China. However, there has been a slight increase in the percentage of Americans with a positive view. As of March, 27% of Americans currently hold a favorable view of China.

data.title: Meta, Broadcom Extend Multi-Year AI Chip Partnership, Stocks Climb
data.description: Shares of Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) and Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) saw an increase during extended trading on Tuesday following an announcement of an extended partnership to develop the industry's first 2nm AI compute accelerator. This collaboration is set to lay the groundwork for a multi-gigawatt infrastructure deployment by 2029 to support Meta's upcoming MTIA (Meta Training and Inference Accelerator) chips. The deal also involves Broadcom's XPU custom technology. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
US TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT: AIM TO DE-RISK FROM CHINA IN CERTAIN AREAS; TARIFFS COULD RETURN TO PRIOR LEVELS BY EARLY JULY
US TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT: GROWTH COULD STILL COMFORTABLY SURPASS 3 PCT OR 3.5 PCT THIS YEAR; UNDERLYING ECONOMY REMAINS ROBUST

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Matt Pancake of Winter Garden, FL, Guides First-Time Homeowners on Home Insurance
data.description: In Winter Garden, Florida, a recent article by HelloNation discusses crucial points about home insurance that first-time homeowners should consider before finalizing their purchase. Featuring advice from Matt Pancake at Bill Pancake Insurance Agency, Inc., the piece provides essential insights for new buyers entering the market. By addressing key concerns, such as coverage options, deductibles, and premiums, the article serves as a valuable resource for individuals navigating the process of purchasing a home.

data.title: Presidio Declares First Dividend as a Public Company
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, Presidio Production Company (NYSE: FTW) declared a special cash dividend of $0.10125 per share of Class A Common Stock. This yield-focused oil and gas operator in the US specializes in acquiring and optimizing producing oil and natural gas wells without drilling. The Q1 2026 dividend of $0.10125 is a pro rata amount for the period.

data.title: DeFi exchange CoW Swap halts protocol after website breach; co-founded by Vitalik Buterin; front-end attack.
data.description: CoW Swap, an exchange platform endorsed by Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin, temporarily halted its operations due to a front-end breach.

data.title: FEMSA Schedules Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: Fomento Económico Mexicano, S.A.B. de C.V., known as FEMSA, has announced its upcoming First Quarter Conference Call scheduled for April 14, 2026. The company, listed on NYSE as FMX and on BMV as FEMSAUBD and FEMSAUB, invites participation in the call.

data.title: In HelloNation, Montessori Education Expert Madelynn Van Den Heuvel Explains Meeting Individual Learning Needs
data.description: In Santa Cruz, California on April 14, 2026, a report discussed how Montessori classrooms cater to individual children's learning styles and developmental levels. The article explored whether schools can effectively adjust to each child's specific pace and characteristics.

data.title: PrideStaff Fresno Moves to New Office to Support Continued Growth
data.description: PrideStaff, a nationally franchised staffing organization, recently revealed that its Fresno office in California has shifted to a larger suite at 675 West Nees Ave, Suite 107, Fresno, CA 93711. The move comes as a result of the ongoing expansion of the Fresno branch, showing the company's commitment to growth in the region.
